title: TESTING4ALL - 211info
text: CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TESTING4ALL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rapid HIV testing, syphilis, hepatitis C, and prevention counseling. 520 NW Davis Street Suite 215 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 10am-4pm Email (503) 223-5907 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 223-5907 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Suggested donation of $50, but no one will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: None SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Multiple TriMet MAX and bus lines within the block Services: AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling Hepatitis Testing HIV Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Syphilis Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - CAMP KC HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PEER-TO-PEER SUPPORT SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - CAP HOUSING SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - DROP IN CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CASCADE AIDS PROJECT
